message:
Running command: # Extract the 21 scenario files from the manifest for documentation
python3 -c "
import yaml
manifest = yaml.safe_load(open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/scenario_manifest.yaml'))
scenarios = manifest['scenarios']
print(f'Total scenarios: {len(scenarios)}')
for i, s in enumerate(scenarios, 1):
    print(f'  [{i:02d}] {s[\"file\"]}')
"
